page: Amazon Web Services r8gd.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. Built on the 64-bit ARMv9 architecture, it features 32 dedicated physical cores using the Neoverse-V2 model running at 2.8 GHz, with one thread per core. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps, running on the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier memory performance, with uncached large-block read bandwidth reaching 405.8 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 184.15 GB/sec. The instance also registers top-tier scores in Geekbench multi-core performance and Passmark database operations. Strong performance is observed in Redis SET operations, static web serving throughput, and single-threaded compression tasks. However, LLM inference speeds show mixed results, with text generation for medium-sized models performing strongly, while prompt processing for larger models falls into the lower performance tiers.

The r8gd.8xlarge offers a resource-dense profile that balances high memory capacity with local NVMe SSD storage. This combination provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high-speed local data access without relying solely on network-attached storage. The instance is suited for memory-intensive applications, high-performance database operations, caching layers like Redis, and data processing pipelines that benefit from the ARMv9 architecture and dedicated physical cores.
description: Amazon Web Services r8gd.8xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance powered by 32 dedicated ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 cores running at 2.8 GHz. It features 256.0 GB of system memory, 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and a 15 Gbps baseline network speed, managed by the Nitro hypervisor. Benchmark data highlights top-tier memory bandwidth, with uncached large-block reads at 405.8 GB/sec and writes at 184.15 GB/sec, alongside top-tier database operations and Geekbench multi-core performance. The instance also delivers strong results in Redis SET operations, static web serving, and single-threaded compression. Conversely, it exhibits weaker performance in large-model LLM prompt processing. Given its high memory-to-core ratio and fast local storage, the r8gd.8xlarge is suited for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and data processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8gd.8xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Graviton cores, 256 GB RAM, and 1900 GB local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.

tagline: An ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores, high-bandwidth memory, and integrated local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database workloads.

Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM and 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database operation benchmarks
